wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Picone
wine_retailers.description: Historic Palermo enoteca since 1946 with 7,000-plus labels; ground floor is a full retail shop by day with a focus on Sicilian artisan producers alongside global grands crus; considered the finest bottle shop in western Sicily.
wine_retailers.tip: The staff can source hard-to-find micro-producer Etna bottles not available elsewhere on the island.

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Regionale di Sicilia
wine_retailers.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele II 155, 95131 Catania (CT), Sicily
wine_retailers.description: Family-run regional wine shop in Catania's old town with an impressive range of wines from small wineries across all of Sicily; Sylvia the daughter speaks fluent English; wine tasting possible on request.
wine_retailers.tip: A reliable benchmark for the full spectrum of Sicilian wines; the liquori and pistachio products are also excellent.

wine_retailers.name: Nelson Sicily
wine_retailers.description: Specialist Sicilian wine and food shop in Catania's Baroque quarter; online store since 2013 with two physical Crociferi storefronts; curated selection of Sicilian estates and artisan producers.
wine_retailers.tip: The second store at Via Crociferi 14 in the San Benedetto monastery is the wine-bar format; No. 50 is the full retail shop.

wine_retailers.name: Cantine Florio Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: On-site bottle shop at the 1833 Florio Marsala cellars; full range of Florio Marsala DOC expressions from Fine to Vergine Riserva, plus limited library releases and Duca di Salaparuta table wines.
wine_retailers.tip: The Marsala Vergine Stravecchio is the premium house expression; rarely found at retail outside Italy.

wine_retailers.name: Donnafugata Cellar Shop
wine_retailers.description: Retail shop at Donnafugata's Marsala historic cellars; full portfolio from Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC to Mille e una Notte Contessa Entellina DOC; exclusive library vintages available in-person.
specialties: Ben Ryé Passito di Pantelleria DOC
wine_retailers.tip: Library vintages of Ben Ryé are only sold at the cellar; pre-order before visiting.

wine_retailers.name: Planeta Wine Shop at La Foresteria
wine_retailers.address: Contrada Passo di Gurra, SP 79, Km 91, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily
wine_retailers.description: Estate bottle shop at Planeta La Foresteria resort; full portfolio across five Sicilian estates from Etna to Menfi to Vittoria; exclusive resort-only cuvees and large-format bottles.
wine_retailers.tip: The Sciaranuova Etna Rosso is exclusive to the estate shop.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Passo di Gurra, Ex S.S. 115 s.p. 79, Km 91 - 92013 Menfi (Ag)

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca dell'Etna
wine_retailers.description: Specialist Etna DOC bottle shop in Catania with one of the deepest selections of contrade-specific Nerello Mascalese and Carricante from micro-producers not widely distributed.
wine_retailers.tip: Ask for the most recent releases from Cornelissen, Vino di Anna and other natural Etna producers.

wine_retailers.name: Cantine Pellegrino Cellar Shop
wine_retailers.description: On-site shop at Cantine Pellegrino's historic seven-generation winery; full range of Marsala DOC expressions plus Pantelleria Passito and table wines; the Ouverture complex has panoramic sea views.
wine_retailers.tip: The Marsala Superiore Riserva 1980 D.O.C. Ambra Dolce from library stock is a collector's item.

wine_retailers.name: Baglio di Pianetto Wine Shop
wine_retailers.address: Via Francia, Santa Cristina Gela, 90030 Palermo (PA), Sicily
wine_retailers.description: Organic estate shop at Baglio di Pianetto; wines from highland Palermo, Noto and Etna terroirs all under the estate's organic certification; good selection of Sicilian olive oil alongside bottles.
wine_retailers.tip: The Shymer Merlot-Syrah is their international-variety flagship and consistently over-delivers for the price.

verified.address_quoted: Via Francia, S. Cristina Gela - 90030 (PA) - Italy

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Solaria
wine_retailers.description: Ortigia institution since 1987; 2,000-plus labels with a focus on natural and artisan producers; triple Slow Wine award winner for best Cerasuolo di Vittoria selection; retail and wine-bar hybrid.
specialties: Canary Islands and Spanish Islands selections
wine_retailers.tip: Elisa Merlo and Gianfilippo Russo are both AIS-certified; their pairing advice is worth taking.
